final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from a central position, facing an East Asian man and his golden retriever dog. The man stands in the center with light skin, short dark hair, and a smiling expression, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt and khaki pants with white shoes. The dog sits to the man's right from the viewer's perspective, with golden fur and a calm demeanor. The ground is entirely covered in a smooth layer of white snow, with faint footprints visible. Numerous people populate the park: in the background, individuals and groups walk along snow-dusted paths, some sit on dark wooden benches under trees with green leaves lightly dusted with snow, and others stand talking, dressed in winter attire like coats, hats, and scarves, with a mix of ethnicities including East Asian and Caucasian. The trees have brown trunks and green foliage, now lightly coated with snow. Two dark wooden benches are visible in the background left and right, with people sitting on them. Beyond, a body of water clearly reflects the overcast sky, and a distant city skyline is visible. The sky is gray and overcast, providing soft, diffused lighting with no harsh shadows. The atmosphere is serene and wintry, with a cool color palette dominated by whites, grays, and muted greens. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural composition.
scene_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from a central position, facing an East Asian man and his golden retriever dog. The man stands in the CENTER with light skin, short dark hair, and a smiling expression, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt and khaki pants with white shoes. The dog sits to his RIGHT with golden fur and a calm demeanor. The ground is entirely covered in a smooth layer of white snow, with faint footprints visible. Numerous people populate the park: in the BACKGROUND, individuals and groups walk along snow-dusted paths, some sit on dark wooden benches under trees with green leaves lightly dusted with snow, and others stand talking, dressed in winter attire like coats, hats, and scarves, with a mix of ethnicities including East Asian, Caucasian, and others. The trees have brown trunks and green foliage, now lightly coated with snow. Two dark wooden benches are visible in the BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT. Beyond, a body of water reflects the overcast sky, and a distant city skyline is visible. The sky is gray and overcast, providing soft, even lighting with no harsh shadows. The atmosphere is serene and wintry, with a cool color palette dominated by whites, grays, and muted greens. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural composition. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing the subjects in the center; Spatial positions: Man in CENTER, dog to his RIGHT, benches in BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT, trees on LEFT and BACKGROUND, water and skyline in far BACKGROUND; Lighting quality: bright daylight with soft shadows cast by trees and subjects, sun overhead. Style reference: For the man: East Asian ethnicity, light skin with warm undertone, dark hair, smiling facial features, lean build, wearing light blue shirt and khaki pants; Dominant color palette: natural greens from grass and trees, blue from sky and shirt, warm tones from dog's fur and man's skin; Surface materials: grass texture, fabric of man's shirt and pants, fur of dog; Overall atmosphere: peaceful, sunny day in a park.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Observe key objects: an East Asian man with light skin, dark hair, smiling, wearing a light blue short-sleeve shirt and khaki pants, standing in the CENTER; a golden retriever dog sitting to his RIGHT; park with green grass, trees on LEFT and BACKGROUND, dark wooden benches in BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT, a body of water and city skyline in far BACKGROUND.
Step 2: Infer the counterfactual change: the instruction implies adding many people to the park and covering the ground with snow, transforming the scene into a snowy winter setting with crowds.

Step 3: Derive expected visual outcome: the ground becomes white with snow, numerous people appear throughout the park in winter clothing, while the man, dog, and other park elements remain in their positions with possible snow accumulation on surfaces like trees and benches.
